case_title: EVGENY S SHEYMAN et al VS. THE GOLDMINE HILL HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATIONS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-30-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-30-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JIM ROSS--VICE PRESIDENT AND MARA HILL WAS REPRESENTING THE GOLDMINE ETC. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-03-2012 ORDERED DESTROYED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,175.00 FILED BY SHEYMAN, EVGENY S SHEYMAN, ALEXANDRA J AS TO DEFENDANT THE GOLDMINE HILL HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATIONS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-30-2012 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT THE GOLDMINE HILL HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATIONS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-30-2012 - JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID MCDONALD. FILED BY SHEYMAN, EVGENY S SHEYMAN, ALEXANDRA J THE GOLDMINE HILL HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATIONS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHEYMAN, EVGENY S SHEYMAN, ALEXANDRA J IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT THE GOLDMINE HILL HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATIONS COURT FINDS THAT THE HOA POSTED SUFFICIENT NOTICE OF THE EXPECTED TOWING AND TRIED TO REACH PLAINTIFFS BEFORE THE CAR WAS TOWED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON 10/14/2025.
